LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT MADELINE ZIMIN MAO MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT AND VACATE DEFAULT JUDGMENT, FOR RETURN OF WRONGFULLY SEIZED FUNDS, REQUEST FOR MONETARY SANCTIONS AND REQUEST FOR LEAVE TO FILE PROPOSED ANSWER AND CROSS-COMPLAINT. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED AND AMENDED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION GRANTED. DEFENDANT LACKED ACTUAL NOTICE OF THE SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT, WHICH WAS NOT DUE TO AVOIDANCE OF SERVICE OR INEXCUSABLE NEGLECT. REQUESTS FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND SANCTIONS DENIED. 2/5/2010 RULING VACATED AS IMPROVIDENTLY HEARD. REQUEST TO ORDER BOND TO BE POSTED DENIED. THE COURT ADDS: PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL SHALL RETURN FUNDS IN THE AMOUNT OF $9,616.54, THE AMOUNT OF FUNDS SEIZED BY PLAINTIFF, FROM THE TRUST ACCOUNT OF DENNIS C. BIRKHIMER, TO DEFENDANT WITHIN 2 BUSINESS DAYS, MADE PAYABLE TO THE SHEPPARD ROSEN CLIENT TRUST ACCOUNT, AFTER NOTICE IS GIVEN TO PLAINTIFF. UPON RECALLING THE CASE, THE PROPOSED ORDER WAS APPROVED BY COUNSEL AND SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD; COURT REPORTER: MARY ELLEN SCHERER CSR #5208

(Amended) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacate Default Judgment, For Return Of Wrongfully Seized Funds, Request For Monetary Sanctions And Request For Leave To File Proposed Answer And X-Complaint
Off Calendar Mar-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MADELINE ZIMIN MAO (Amended) Motion to Set Aside Default and Vacate Default Judgment, for Return of Wrongfully Seized Funds, Request for Monetary Sanctions and Request for Leave to File Proposed Answer and Cross-Complaint. Appearances: Allen Kent, Law Offices of Dennis C. Birkhimer (415) 257-4700 appearing for Plaintiff, and opposing party; Robert J. Sheppard, Esq. & Juliana Pisari, Esq. of Sheppard, Rosen, Uziel & Sussman, (415) 296-0900 appearing for Defendant and Moving party. Argued and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted. Defendant lacked actual notice of the summons and complaint, which was not due to avoidance of service or inexcusable neglect. Requests for attorney fees and sanctions denied. 2/5/2010 ruling vacated as improvidently heard. Request to order bond to be posted denied. The Court adds: Plaintiff's counsel shall return funds in the amount of $9,616.54, the amount of funds seized by Plaintiff, from the Trust Account of Dennis C. Birkhimer, to Defendant within 2 business days, made payable to the Sheppard Rosen Client Trust Account, after notice is given to Plaintiff. Upon recalling the case, the Proposed Order was approved by counsel and signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Mary Ellen Scherer CSR # 5208

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Default And Vacate Default Judgment, For Return Of Wrongfully Seized Funds And Rquest For Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Feb-05-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT MADELINE ZIMIN MAO'S Motion to Set Aside Default and Vacate Default Judgment, For Return of Wrongfully Seized Funds and Request for Monetary Sanctions. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion denied without prejudice to comply with CCP section 473.5(b) proposed pleading requirement and CCP section 1005(b) notice requirement. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR # 4780
